query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'on_hold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as on_hold
FROM receipt_review_logs;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'rejected' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected,
  SUM(CASE WHEN decision = 'on_hold' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as on_hold
FROM receipt_review_logs;
